bugs.title: Failure to Prioritize Urgent Appointment
bugs.evidence: Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent failed to prioritize the urgent request for a same-day or next-day appointment, leading to potential delays in care for the patient’s worsening symptoms.
bugs.recommendation: The agent should prioritize urgent requests and immediately seek to schedule an appointment rather than connecting the user to another representative.

bugs.title: Inadequate Triage Response
bugs.evidence: I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent did not triage the patient’s symptoms or provide an immediate scheduling option, which is crucial for urgent but non-emergency situations.
bugs.recommendation: Provide at least a same-day appointment instead of transferring to another team.

overall_notes: The agent did not effectively handle the urgency of the patient's request. Instead of scheduling an appointment, the agent directed the patient to another representative without first attempting to book an appointment. This could potentially delay needed care for the patient's symptoms.
